chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4383 of 2024 Pakistan Steel Mills Corporation (Pvt.) Limited Versus Federation of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.19450/2024 (stay). 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 23.09.2024 Mr. Aga Zafar Ahmed, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This petition was filed before this Court as the Competition Appellate Tribunal was not functional. In addition to it, the impugned amount has already been recovered and hence as far as the issue of recovery of the amount is concerned, that has already been implemented and now at the most they (petitioner) could agitate their appeal before the forum having jurisdiction that is the Competition Appellate Tribunal. As submitted by both the counsel since the Tribunal is not functional, it is deemed appropriate that the directions be given to the respondents that the Chairman of the Tribunal be appointed at the earliest and as conceded by learned D.A.G, within thirty days. In case the Tribunal is so constituted by the appointment of the Chairman, the appeal of the petitioner shall be heard at the earliest, preferably within next thirty days of the appointment of the Chairman. With this understanding of law, the petition stands disposed of along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
